conversations.content: Today we studied the Blackrock Mountain Iron Legion Molten Front Military Regulations. If a Dark Iron Dwarf underground steam drill is observed...
Dark Iron Dwarves tunneling to ambush? Tell me how to counter it!
then throw an electromagnetic pulse grenade, then activate the magma diversion channel to flood the tunnel.
EMP grenade to destroy the drill, magma to flood the tunnel — brutal enough! Any other threats?
If the elemental whispers of Ragnaros's servants are intercepted, then hurl a frost-enchanted warhammer, then open the Deepholm coolant valve.
Frost hammer to smash the elementals, then open coolant valve to lower the temperature! What's the third scenario?
If the shadowflame breath of the Black Dragonflight is sensed, then raise an arcane magic resistance shield, then summon Stormwind gryphon riders for an airstrike.
Arcane shield blocks the flame, gryphon airstrike counters — nice! When any of these happens, what must ultimately be done?
If any of the above situations occurs, then the Great Forge's warning gong must be struck, all defenders withdraw into the shelter, and the peripheral lava traps must be detonated.

think: Blackrock Mountain Iron Legion Molten Front: three threats: Dark Iron Dwarf underground drill → EMP grenade + magma diversion channel; Ragnaros's servant elemental whispers → frost-enchanted warhammer + Deepholm coolant valve; Black Dragonflight shadowflame breath → arcane shield + Stormwind gryphon airstrike. Any case → strike Great Forge warning gong + all defenders withdraw to shelter + detonate peripheral lava traps.
memory: Blackrock Mountain Iron Legion Molten Front Military Regulations: If a Dark Iron Dwarf underground steam drill is observed, then throw an electromagnetic pulse grenade, then activate the magma diversion channel to flood the tunnel; if the elemental whispers of Ragnaros's servants are intercepted, then hurl a frost-enchanted warhammer, then open the Deepholm coolant valve; if the shadowflame breath of the Black Dragonflight is sensed, then raise an arcane magic resistance shield, then summon Stormwind gryphon riders for an airstrike; if any of the above situations occurs, then the Great Forge's warning gong must be struck, all defenders withdraw into the shelter, and the peripheral lava traps must be detonated.
